hero.desc: We design and deploy full-stack AI systems — from real-time voice pipelines to domain-specific LLMs and enterprise automation. Every system ships production-ready, with measurable performance benchmarks.

metrics.downloads: Open-source model downloads on Hugging Face
metrics.users: Organic app users, zero paid acquisition

services.title: End-to-End AI Engineering
services.desc: From real-time voice systems to domain-tuned LLMs and intelligent automation — we own every layer of the stack.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.desc: We design no-code and low-code AI pipelines using n8n — connecting your APIs, databases, and AI models into self-running workflows. From data ingestion to customer-facing agents, we automate operations end-to-end.

items.title: Real-Time Voice AI
items.desc: Full-stack voice pipelines with Whisper ASR, custom TTS, and LLM reasoning at the core. Sub-second end-to-end latency. Deployable on cloud, on-prem GPU, or serverless infrastructure.

items.title: LLM Fine-Tuning
items.desc: Domain-specific model training with LoRA adapters, INT4/INT8 quantization via Unsloth, and hardware-agnostic deployment. We ship models that outperform general-purpose LLMs on your data.

items.title: RAG & Knowledge Systems
items.desc: Secure, offline retrieval-augmented generation over your proprietary data. FAISS and Pinecone vector stores, semantic reranking, query routing, and guardrails — built for accuracy, not demos.

items.title: AI Consulting & Architecture
items.desc: System design, model selection, on-prem GPU infrastructure planning, and technical roadmaps. We help engineering teams make the right architectural decisions before writing a single line of code.

items.title: AI-Powered Mobile Apps
items.desc: iOS and Android applications with embedded AI capabilities — from idea to App Store. We've shipped mobile products that grew to 600+ organic users with zero marketing spend.

items.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
items.desc: On-prem A100/H100 cluster setup, RunPod serverless deployment, Docker/Kubernetes orchestration. We handle the MLOps layer so your team ships models, not YAML files.

core.title: Sub-Second Voice AI, Production-Ready
core.desc: We engineer full-stack voice agents that transcribe, reason, and respond — in Turkish and English — within a single second. Every component is benchmarked: ASR under 200ms, LLM under 400ms, TTS under 150ms.
bullets: Whisper Large v3, fine-tuned on Turkish speech corpora
Custom TTS with PiperTTS voice cloning — native Turkish prosody
Real-time communication via LiveKit and Pipecat frameworks
Deployable on RunPod, on-prem A100/H100, or serverless
core.speaker: Speaker

turkish.title: Turkish-First LLMs. Optimized. On-Prem.
turkish.desc: We train and deploy Turkish-language models for high-stakes domains: legal, agricultural, medical, and enterprise. Models run entirely on your infrastructure — no API calls, no data exposure, no vendor lock-in.
bullets: LoRA fine-tuning with Unsloth — 3× faster, 60% less VRAM
Published Turkish models on Hugging Face: 1,200+ downloads

metrics.title: ASR performance gain
metrics.sub: Whisper fine-tuning on domain-specific Turkish corpus

projects.title: Case Studies
projects.desc: Production systems, open-source models, and shipped products — each with measurable outcomes.

items.title: Turkish Speech & Language Models
items.desc: Full suite of Turkish AI models — LLM, TTS, and STT — published open-source on Hugging Face. 1,200+ downloads by researchers and developers across Turkey and globally.

items.title: Legal RAG System
items.desc: Domain-specific retrieval-augmented generation for Turkish legal documents. Semantic indexing, multi-stage reranking, and LLM-generated responses with source citations and guardrails.

items.title: Aerospace R&D Intelligence Agent
items.desc: Autonomous multi-agent system that continuously monitors research papers and patent databases to surface actionable R&D opportunities for aerospace and defense engineering teams.

items.title: LawBuddy — Legal Study App
items.desc: AI-powered mobile application for Turkish law students. Personalized study analytics, progress tracking, and exam preparation. Reached 600+ active users with zero paid marketing.

items.title: AI Pulse — Research Aggregator
items.desc: Real-time intelligence platform aggregating AI research from ArXiv, Hugging Face, and tech publications. Built-in Spark AI summarization engine for rapid paper digestion.

items.title: Real-Time Voice AI Assistant
items.desc: End-to-end streaming voice AI with sub-second latency. RAG-powered context awareness, multi-turn dialogue, and a full MLOps deployment pipeline on GPU infrastructure.

items.title: Operations Automation Agent
items.desc: Intelligent operations management system for a tourism enterprise — automating price calculation, supplier communication, and booking workflows via n8n and custom LLM orchestration.
